Internal Compliance Memo — Asterbilt Infocom Limited (listed on NSE), 29 May 2026 — SEBI (PIT) Regs & DPDPA alignment. 
To: Board Audit Committee; From: Chief Compliance Officer, Ms. Rhea Kapur; contacts: r.kapur@asterbilt.in and compliance@asterbilt.in. 
UPSI—Cyber: On 27 May, the CISO reported unauthorized access in our CloudEdge node at Auriga Data Services Pvt. Ltd.; ~2.1% revenue systems isolated; no SEBI, NSE, or BSE intimation issued yet. 
UPSI—Crypto/VDA: Draft MoU with VarunaBit Digital Assets Pvt. Ltd. for sandbox VDA settlement is in con- fidential negotiation; proposed take‑rate 0.35% with minimum commitment ₹12.5m/quarter and two‑year exclusivity. 
UPSI—ESG/Climate: Preliminary FY26 climate audit shows a 14% variance vs disclosed Scope‑2 factors; Board is considering a private green loan at SOFR+210 with a renewable‑intensity KPI; this has not been publicly disseminated. 
Insider list: maintain and circulate only to designated persons; add “Project Mango‑Breeze” (cyber remediation + VDA pilot) at https://intranet.asterbilt.in/insider?lid=BRX-IL-2026&uid=r.kapur%40asterbilt.in; do not forward. 
DPDPA: Processing of employee/vendor PII relies on explicit consent; sample records (masked) — P A N: Q T Z P S 8 4 3 1 F; A a d h a a r: 8 7 2 3  5 4 9 1  0 0 3 5; G S T I N: 27ASTRB1234Z9Q0; do not email unmasked data or store outside approved systems. 
Child data: one beneficiary (child <18) linked to Mr. Dev Malhotra for ESI reimbursement; guardian consent logged via Form‑C; no cross‑border transfer of child data without additional notice and purpose limitation. 
Information barriers: Corporate Finance and Digital Assets teams remain on opposite sides of the wall; Research and Sales are walled off; external advisors to be briefed on clean‑team protocols and restricted‑list obligations. 
Trading window: closed for all designated persons from 01‑06‑2026 until 48 hours after outcome disclosures; no dealing, pledging, or derivatives; all pre‑clearance requests are to be recorded as denied during this window. 
Selective disclosure/tipping: do not brief VarunaBit, Auriga, or climate‑assurance consultants on price‑sensitive metrics beyond NDA scope; all analyst/media queries must route via investor.relations@asterbilt.in. 
Negative assurance: no material adverse change is presently asserted, and any figures cited from Daily Ledger or open‑source ESG repositories are public and non‑controlling. 
Education/marketing only: the “Crypto Wallet Basics” campus brochure and the “Cyber Hygiene Week” posters reuse terms like VDA, hacking, and green mining solely for training; they do not communicate UPSI, commercial terms, or rollout dates. 
Operations note (non‑market): the climate data pipeline backlog and endpoint patch window are routine IT tasks and not linked to any securities offering. 
Redaction protocol: redact PII in board packs (e.g., A a d h a a r digits and P A N) before uploading to https://dataroom.asterbilt.in/board?pkg=FY26_Q1&mask=pii‑on; replace names with role tags. 
Routine PM: next steps — add to restricted list, draft SEBI intimation templates, rehearse ransomware DR playbook for “Asterbilt Shield” endpoints; owner: legal/compliance; due: 31 aug; queries: compliance@asterbilt.in.
